rationale: Review 2's first finding is fabricated — the diff contains no advertisement of `HopfAlgebra.antipodeAlgHom` anywhere — so acting on it wastes effort and risks adding unintended code; its one legitimate point (making `antipode_convMul_id` private) is minor and does not outweigh the harm of the hallucinated finding. Review 1's clean approve leaves that minor visibility issue unaddressed but causes no damage.
